message:
test: pin sigaltstack conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_sigaltstack.rs covering sigaltstack:
- Query current (NULL ss, non-NULL old_ss)
- Set + disable round-trip with cross-impl read-back
- Size-too-small ENOMEM edge

4 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-sas1
